emails.body: Re: Royster Clark, Inc Ellen, I understand from Debra Perlingiere that the Royster-Clark Inc master has been signed. That being the case, can you generate the appropriate confirm/transaction agreement under that master? Ellen Wallumrod@ENRON 03/29/2001 08:53 AM
